description: Directory structure created and Makefile configured
steps: Create Makefile with Pulse and F* includes

description: Spec.Graph ported from Spec.Graph3 with clean naming
steps: Keep canonical exports: vertex_id, vertex_set, edge, reach, reachable

description: Spec.Heap ported with clean naming
steps: Keep: read_word, write_word, replace_range, hp_addr, mword
Remove read_word1 and other numbered variants

description: Spec.Object ported with clean predicate names
Spec.Fields ported with concise function names
Spec.Mark ported with clean function names
DFS ported from DFS2 with clean module name
steps: Update imports to use Spec.Graph (not Spec.Graph3)

description: Color preorder PCM defined with FractionalAnchoredPreorder
Atomic CAS color operations implemented
steps: Define cas_color : hp_addr → color → color → stt_atomic bool
Prove cas_color refines colorHeader on success

description: Shadow stack supports concurrent GC reads
steps: Define shadow_stack type with fractional permissions
Implement iterate_roots: GC reads with read permission

description: Tri-color invariant defined as CancellableInvariant
Gray set ghost state tracks pending work
steps: Prove gray set membership iff color is gray
Prove gray set shrinks during mark
Prove empty gray set implies mark complete

description: CAS operations preserve tri-color invariant
steps: Prove: cas white gray preserves tri-color
Prove: cas gray black preserves tri-color

description: Dijkstra write barrier preserves tri-color invariant
steps: Implement write_barrier with atomic color checks
If source black and target white, CAS target to gray

description: Concurrent mark step processes one gray object
steps: Pop gray object from SpinLock-protected stack
Gray all white children via CAS
CAS object from gray to black

description: Concurrent mark loop terminates with empty gray set
steps: Add termination argument with ghost gray set
Prove all reachable objects black at end

description: Root scanning via shadow stacks works concurrently
steps: For each root: CAS white→gray and push

description: Stop-the-world sweep reclaims white objects
steps: Prove: after mark, live objects are black

description: Full concurrent GC entry point orchestrates phases
Mutator API provides safe allocation and writes
Tri-color invariant maintained throughout GC
steps: Prove invariant holds at GC start

description: Reachability preservation proven
steps: Prove: reachable_from_roots x → is_black x after mark

description: GC termination proven with decreasing variant
All concurrent GC code extracts to valid C
steps: Verify no ghost-only types in runtime

description: Pulse atomics map to C11 atomics
Concurrent GC integrates with OCaml runtime
Unit tests pass for concurrency primitives
notes: Test.Atomics.fst created with unit tests for color operations, header layout, and address calculations

description: Integration test: parallel mutators + GC succeeds
steps: Create test with multiple mutator threads
notes: Test.Concurrent.fst created with parallel CAS tests, write barrier tests, and GC+mutator integration specs

description: Benchmark shows reduced pause times vs STW
notes: Requires runtime integration and extracted C code
